title: Protocol between the Government of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Irealand and the Government of the Kingdom of Norway, further amending the Convention for the Avoidance of Double Taxation and the Prevention of Fiscal Evasion with respect to Taxes on Income and Capital, signed at London on 22 January 1969, as amended by the Protocols signed at London on 23 June 1977, at Oslo on 29 March 1978 and at Oslo on 16 October 1979
subject: TAXATION
